articles.headline: Kane eyes Lewandowski record: Tracking Europe's major goal, assist records
articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

images.name: Harry Kane [1296x729]
images.caption: Kane scored his 20th Bundesliga goal of the season today after just 16 games.
images.credit: Photo by Tom Weller/picture alliance via Getty Images

images.name: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes [1296x729]
images.caption: Bruno Fernandes' assist tally took a sizeable leap after Ruben Amorim was sacked as Manchester United manager.

images.name: Lamine Yamal, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Neither Kylian Mbappé nor Lamine Yamal are likely to break Lionel Messi's single-season goal and assist marks in LaLiga.

images.name: Inter Milan's Lautaro Martinez [1296x729]
images.caption: Lautaro Martinez easily leads the Seire A scoring chart, but he won't get near the single-season record.

images.name: Mason Greenwood aug 2025 [1296x729]
images.caption: Mason Greenwood was made to share the Ligue 1 top scorer title last season.

images.name: Vinicus Junior, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappé is within reach of Cristiano Ronaldo's single-season Champions League goal record.
images.credit: David S. Bustamante/Real Madrid via Getty Images

images.name: Bayern Munich holds on for 3-2 win
images.caption: Harry Kane scores a brace as Bayern Munich beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-2.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Man United keeping tabs on Stuttgart's Andrés
articles.description: Manchester United could look to the Bundesliga for their newest midfield signing. Transfer Talk has the latest.

images.name: Chema Andrés [1296x729]
images.credit: (Photo by Harry Langer/picture alliance via Getty Images)

images.name: Is Lamine Yamal the best player in the world?
images.caption: The 'ESPN FC' crew react to Lamine Yamal becoming the youngest player to score a LaLiga hat-trick this century as Barcelona beat Villarreal 4-1.

articles.headline: Arsenal win ugly vs. Chelsea; Bayern close in on Bundesliga title; more
articles.description: Arsenal muscled past Chelsea on Sunday, but coach Mikel Arteta can't be happy at how difficult things look for his team. Also: Bayern Munich likely wrapped up the Bundesliga with a Der Klassiker win.

images.name: Arsenal celeb v Chelsea 260302 [1296x729]
images.credit: Stuart MacFarlane/Arsenal FC via Getty Images

images.name: Can Arsenal ride set-pieces all the way to the title?
images.caption: Shaka Hislop and Steve Nicol wonder if Arsenal are too reliant on set-pieces to win the Premier League title.

articles.headline: Dortmund captain Emre Can out for season with torn ACL
articles.description: Borussia Dortmund captain Emre Can will miss the rest of the season with a torn ACL in his left knee.

images.name: Can Dortmund torn ACL_260228 [1296x729]
images.caption: Emre Can leaves the field during Dortmund's game against Bayern Munich after sustaining an injury.
images.alt: Emre Can leaves the field during Dortmund's game against Bayern Munich after sustaining an injury.

images.name: Bayern Munich wins 3-2 thriller over Dortmund
images.caption: Bayern Munich gets a late goal from Joshua Kimmich to beat Borussia Dortmund 3-2 in Der Klassiker.

article.headline: Bayer Leverkusen edge RB Leigzig in thrilling 3-2 opener
article.description: Bayer Leverkusen battled past RB Leipzig 3-2 in an entertaining Bundesliga opener on Saturday to confirm their status as potential title contenders.
article.linkText: Leverkusen edge past RB Leipzig in 3-2 thriller

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Loïs Openda heads in his 1st Bundesliga goal for Leipzig) 2023/08/19 ESHEET

article.story:
Bayer Leverkusen battled past visitors RB Leipzig 3-2 in an entertaining Bundesliga opener on Saturday to confirm their preseason status as potential title contenders.

Xabi Alonso's team looked sharp from the start with new signing Victor Boniface adding considerable firepower to their attack.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Despite some sloppy defending that allowed Leipzig to twice cut the deficit, they bagged the three points to draw level with champions Bayern Munich, 4-0 winners at Werder Bremen on Friday.

Leipzig, fresh from last week's 3-0 German Super Cup win over Bayern, had the early chances but it was the hosts who struck first.

Nigeria striker Boniface superbly set up Jeremie Frimpong for a tap-in after 24 minutes and Jonathan Tah doubled their lead 11 minutes later with a powerful header from a corner.

The visitors pulled a goal back with Dani Olmo's glancing header at the near post in the 39th, with the Spaniard now having scored four times in two matches after his hat trick against Bayern.

Leverkusen briefly restored their two-goal cushion when Germany international Florian Wirtz, whose earlier point-blank shot was saved by Leipzig's Janis Blaswich, sensationally chipped the ball over the keeper after 64 minutes.

Leipzig again cut the deficit six minutes later with Lois Openda's close-range header. The Belgian forward then hit the post in the 74th as Leipzig went in search of an equaliser but they eventually ran out of time.

videos.headline: Florian Wirtz kisses Leverkusen's winning goal in off the crossbar
videos.description: Bayer Leverkusen takes a 3-1 lead over RB Leipzig thanks to a fine finish from Florian Wirtz.

videos.headline: Jeremie Frimpong curls in the opening goal for Leverkusen
videos.description: Jeremie Frimpong is in the right place at the right time to receive Victor Boniface's pass for the opening goal against RB Leipzig.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jeremie Frimpong curls in the opening goal for Leverkusen) 2023/08/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jonathan Tah's header finds the corner to double Leverkusen's lead
videos.description: Jonathan Tah is left open on the corner kick and flicks in a perfect header to make it 2-0 Bayer Leverkusen over RB Leipzig.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jonathan Tah's header finds the corner to double Leverkusen's lead) 2023/08/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dani Olmo's header pulls one back for RB Leipzig
videos.description: Dani Olmo finds the back of the net with his header to cut Leipzig's deficit in half against Leverkusen.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Dani Olmo nods home header vs. Bayer Leverkusen) 2023/08/19 ESHEET

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, RB Leipzig 0. Jeremie Frimpong (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Victor Boniface.
